item.title: 为何伊朗战争重燃了美国对滞胀的担忧
item.description: 伊朗战争在能源和金融市场引发了连锁反应，重新点燃了通胀担忧，并给经济增长带来了风险。与去年不同的是，当时的担忧源于唐纳德·特朗普总统实施的关税政策，而如今的担忧则源于人们担心油价的急剧上涨可能会成为常态。【原文：The Iran war has reverberated through energy and financial markets, rekindling inflation concerns and risks to economic growth. Unlike last year, when the source of these worries was President Donald Trump’s tariffs, the concerns now are based on fears that sharply higher oil prices could become entrenched.】

item.title: 政治界似乎尚未做好迎接人工智能的准备
item.description: 我们这个时代的决定性问题？【原文：The defining issue of our time?】

item.title: 英伟达预计到2027年将通过AI芯片赚取1万亿美元
item.description: 作为人工智能计算领域迅猛扩张的核心企业，英伟达公司预计，截至2027年底，其Blackwell和Rubin芯片将带来至少1万亿美元的收入。【原文：Nvidia Corp., the company at the center of an explosive build-out of AI computing, expects to generate at least $1 trillion from its Blackwell and Rubin chips through the end of 2027.】

item.title: 布伦特原油连续第三个交易日收于每桶100美元上方
item.description: 布伦特原油连续第三个交易日收于100美元上方，创下自2022年8月以来的最长连涨纪录。投资者一方面关注短期供应充裕的迹象，另一方面则担忧中东地区能源基础设施面临的军事威胁日益加剧。【原文：Brent oil settled above $100 for a third straight session, the longest such streak since August 2022, as investors weighed signs of ample near-term supplies against rising military threats to energy infrastructure across the Middle East.】

item.title: 船只遭袭后，穿越霍尔木兹海峡的航运保险费用飙升
item.description: 据市场相关人士称，尽管成本极高，但为穿越霍尔木兹海峡的船舶投保仍是可行的。【原文：Insuring vessels to sail through the Strait of Hormuz is still possible, even if at a very high cost, according to people involved in the market.】

item.title: 美国计划在阿拉斯加建设自2013年以来首个新建燃煤电厂
item.description: Terra Energy Center正向阿拉斯加一项拟建的煤炭项目投入10亿美元，这标志着十多年来美国首次对新建燃煤发电项目进行投资。【原文：Terra Energy Center is pouring $1 billion into a deal for a planned coal project in Alaska, marking the first investment in new US coal power in more than a decade.】

item.title: 古巴因燃料供应短缺遭遇全国性大停电
item.description: 周一，古巴电网发生全面停电，这个岛国正因美国为向共产主义政府施压而实施的实质性石油封锁，面临燃料供应短缺的困境。【原文：Cuba’s electric grid suffered a total power failure Monday as the island nation struggles with fuel supplies amid a de facto US oil blockade to pressure the communist government.】

item.title: 芝加哥地区190亿美元的税单引发了评估员职位的争夺战
item.description: 芝加哥房地产行业因一项价值190亿美元的税单而爆发激烈争论，业主们认为该税单阻碍了新建项目，并导致租金飙升。【原文：Chicago’s real estate industry has ignited a battle over a $19 billion tax bill that property owners say is holding back new construction and contributing to surging rents.】

item.title: 奥斯卡获奖制片公司的剖析：票房火爆，利润微薄
item.description: Neon已连续三年斩获奥斯卡奖，但其主要收入来源是恐怖片和流媒体业务【原文：Neon has won Oscars three years in a row, but it makes more money from horror films and streaming】

item.title: 就连主要能源出口国澳大利亚也难以幸免于伊朗战争的影响
item.description: 随着中东战争进入第三周，澳大利亚——国内炼油能力所剩无几——正表明，即便是主要的化石燃料出口国也无法幸免于日益加剧的能源危机。【原文：As the war in the Middle East enters its third week, Australia — with not much domestic refining left — is showcasing how even major fossil fuel exporters aren’t immune to the widening energy crunch.】

item.title: 莫斯科争分夺秒，趁油价飙升、制裁暂停之际大赚一笔
item.description:
随着原油从俄罗斯的太平洋和北极港口大量涌出，出货量创下一年多来最大增幅【原文：

Shipments surged by the most in more than a year as crude flooded out of Russia’s Pacific and Arctic ports

】

item.title: 沃伯格计划以25亿美元以上的价格出售汽车贷款机构埃克塞特
item.description: 据知情人士透露，华平投资正处于考虑出售次级汽车贷款机构埃克塞特金融（Exeter Finance）的初期阶段，此项交易预计可筹得25亿至30亿美元。【原文：Warburg Pincus is in the early stages of weighing a sale of subprime auto lender Exeter Finance that could fetch $2.5 billion to $3 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: Sonos首席执行官致力于耳机业务，但不涉足车载音响领域
item.description: Sonos公司首席执行官汤姆·康拉德表示，尽管该公司在该领域的首次尝试未能赢得消费者青睐，但公司仍致力于耳机产品线。【原文：Sonos Inc. Chief Executive Officer Tom Conrad said the company remains committed to the headphones category, even though its first effort in that space failed to win over consumers.】

item.title: 债券基金助推利率差异押注，逆势抵御通胀威胁
item.description: 尽管伊朗战争引发的通胀担忧为加息提供了更多理由，但债券经理们仍在加码押注各国央行的货币政策将出现分化。【原文：Bond managers are doubling down on bets that central banks’ monetary policy will diverge, even as the inflation fear unleashed by the war in Iran boosts the case for higher interest rates.】

item.title: 法官裁定Krafton必须重新聘用被解雇的《Subnautica》首席执行官
item.description:
Unknown Worlds Entertainment的前老板泰德·吉尔曾以违约为由起诉母公司Krafton 【原文：

Ted Gill, former boss of Unknown Worlds Entertainment, had sued parent company Krafton for breach of contract 

】

item.title: 中国GCL将向丹格特埃塞俄比亚公司供应天然气，交易额达42亿美元
item.description: 中国金康集团同意向阿利科·丹格特在埃塞俄比亚规划中的化肥厂供应天然气，供气期为25年，该交易价值42亿美元。【原文：China’s Golden Concord Group Ltd. agreed to supply natural gas to Aliko Dangote’s planned fertilizer unit in Ethiopia for 25 years in a deal valued at $4.2 billion.】

item.title: 千禧基金从对冲基金Scopia撤回10亿美元投资
item.description: 在投资Scopia Capital Management这家多空对冲基金管理公司一年多后，Millennium Management已赎回了其投资。【原文：Millennium Management has redeemed its investment from Scopia Capital Management just over a year after backing the equity long-short hedge fund manager.】

item.title: 米尔肯支持的私立学校正寻求通过市政债券市场筹集新校区建设资金
item.description: 一家与著名垃圾债券投资者迈克尔·米尔肯有联系的洛杉矶私立学校，正计划出售6300万美元的市政债券，以筹集资金扩建校园。【原文：A Los Angeles private school with ties to famous junk bond investor Michael Milken is looking to sell $63 million in municipal bonds to fund a campus expansion.】

item.title: 诺华发行高评级债券为120亿美元收购Avidity交易提供资金
item.description: 诺华公司正计划通过举债为其以120亿美元收购Avidity Biosciences Inc提供资金，这进一步加剧了近期并购融资交易的热潮。【原文：Novartis AG is seeking to raise debt to help fund its $12 billion acquisition of Avidity Biosciences Inc, adding to a flurry of M&A financing deals.】

item.title: 捷豹路虎称因市场波动暂缓债券发行
item.description: 知情人士周一表示，捷豹路虎汽车公司（Jaguar Land Rover Automotive Plc）已决定因市场波动而暂缓推进一项潜在的美国债券发行计划，这表明尽管整体发行规模较大，但部分投资级债券发行正受到伊朗战争的影响。【原文：Jaguar Land Rover Automotive Plc has decided not to move forward with a potential US bond sale due to market volatility, people with knowledge of the transaction said on Monday, signaling some investment-grade offerings are being impacted by the Iran war despite high issuance overall.】

item.title: Citadel Securities 在国债市场暴跌后撤回看跌预测
item.description: Citadel Securities 放弃了对美国国债的看跌立场，称市场已基本消化了油价飙升带来的通胀风险，但低估了其对全球经济增长的潜在冲击。【原文：Citadel Securities dropped its bearish stance toward US Treasuries, saying markets have largely priced in the inflation risks from the surge in oil prices and are underestimating the potential damage to global growth.】

item.title: 法庭文件显示，若调查继续，鲍威尔将留任美联储
item.description: 上周公布的与美国检察官珍妮恩·皮罗对美联储调查相关的法庭文件显示，美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔感到有必要继续留任美联储理事会，至少在法律程序结束之前。【原文：Court papers released last week related to US Attorney Jeanine Pirro’s investigation of the Federal Reserve show Chair Jerome Powell feels compelled to stay on the central bank’s Board of Governors, at least until the legal process is completed.】

item.title: Grindr 推出全新 AI 功能，并公布高级订阅套餐详情
item.description: Grindr Inc. 发布了一系列新应用功能，并透露了有关其高级订阅套餐的更多细节，这是该公司在整个LGBTQ约会平台上全面整合人工智能的更大计划的一部分。【原文：Grindr Inc. unveiled a handful of new app features and shared more details around its premium subscription tier as part of a larger effort to integrate artificial intelligence across its LGBTQ dating platform.】

item.title: 苹果收购MotionVFX，旨在通过创作者内容提升订阅业务
item.description: 苹果公司收购了波兰公司MotionVFX，该公司为苹果的Final Cut Pro软件开发了广受欢迎的插件和扩展功能。此举是苹果公司为从创意专业人士群体中获取更多收入而采取的更广泛举措的一部分。【原文：Apple Inc. acquired MotionVFX, a Polish company that develops popular plug-ins and add-on capabilities for the tech giant’s Final Cut Pro software, part of a broader push to generate more revenue from creative professionals.】

item.title: 美国银行将超大规模企业债券发行预测上调至1750亿美元
item.description: 美国银行将所谓“超大规模科技公司”2026年投资级债券销售额的预测上调了25%，至1750亿美元，并预计今年仍有650亿美元的新增发行。【原文：Bank of America Corp. increased its 2026 forecast for investment-grade debt sales by so-called hyperscalers by 25% to $175 billion, with an expectation of $65 billion in new issuance still expected this year.】

item.title: Atlassian称，解雇那位称CEO是“有钱的混蛋”的工程师是正当的
item.description:
美国劳工委员会指控该公司因一名软件工程师批评首席执行官而将其解雇的行为属于违法【原文：

The US labor board alleges the company’s firing of a software engineer over criticisms of the CEO was illegal

】

item.title: 受油价下跌影响，美元或将迎来逾一个月来最糟糕的一天
item.description: 受关键石油运输航线有望恢复通航的预期影响，油价走低，美元汇率正面临逾一个月来最糟糕的一天。【原文：The dollar is headed for its worst day in over a month as hopes that shipping traffic through a key oil route will resume pushed oil prices lower.】

item.title: 几内亚拟出台更严格的铝土矿供应规定以遏制价格暴跌
item.description: 作为全球最大的铝土矿生产国，几内亚正与矿商就控制供应市场的矿石数量、以保护本国免受价格暴跌影响的计划进行磋商。【原文：Guinea, the world’s largest producer of bauxite, is in discussions with miners about plans to control the volume of ore supplied to the market and protect the country against a slump in prices.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发美国页岩油企业股票抛售潮
item.description: 随着伊朗局势加剧市场波动，并导致其他领域的融资活动陷入停滞，美国上市油气生产商的股票抛售潮正使3月成为该行业六年来最繁忙的月份。【原文：Stock sales by US-listed oil and gas producers are making March the sector’s busiest month in more than six years as the war in Iran whips up volatility and stalls capital-raising activity from other corners of the market.】

item.title: 加拿大租用太空港，力图摆脱对马斯克SpaceX等美国火箭的依赖
item.description: 马克·卡尼总理领导的政府宣布达成一项为期10年、价值2亿加元（1.46亿美元）的协议，将利用加拿大东海岸的一座私人航天港，以此建立独立于美国及其他国家的卫星发射能力。【原文：Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government announced a 10-year, C$200 million ($146 million) agreement to use a private space port on Canada’s east coast as it pursues a satellite launch capability independent of the US and other countries.】
